objective: Verify time and intention before starting script

smooth_questions: what are you up to rn?
are you alone? i wouldnt want anyone else to see
three_requirements.bad_question: do you have time right now?
three_requirements.if_no_time: Continue 3-4 messages small talk, then ask for promise to return
three_requirements.if_pushy: Sell nudes instead of starting script

checks: want to see what im wearing?
i could show you something right now if you really want it
three_requirements.action: Wait for confirmation he wants it

phrases: give me a second to prepare
